feat.name: Withstand the Storm
feat.text: Your skin hardens like bark and gains the sheen of glazed clay, lessening the wild’s ruinous sting against your body. You gain resistance equal to your level against the triggering damage type.

traits.name: Yaksha
traits.text: Divine spirits who emigrated to Golarion from the first world.

feat.trigger: You would take cold, electricity, fire, poison, or sonic damage.
